macro.title: US inflation jumps to 3.8% as energy costs surge from Iran war - BBC
macro.summary: The key measure of US inflation rises its highest level since May 2023 as consumers feel the impact of the Iran war.

macro.title: CME to Create Futures Market for Computing Power Backing AI - Bloomberg.com
macro.summary: US derivatives exchange CME Group Inc. and index provider Silicon Data are teaming up to create a futures market for computing power, a key source driving the AI boom.

macro.title: Elon Musk and Apple's Tim Cook will travel to China with US delegation: White House - Fox Business
macro.summary: Elon Musk, Apple's Tim Cook and other business figures will travel to China with the U.S. delegation, according to a White House official.

macro.title: Bulls and bears both believe this could be 1999 all over again. Embrace it or dump your tech stocks? - CNBC
macro.summary: We are not guaranteed a close rerun of the 1999-2000 extremes. Just because things got crazier then doesn't mean that's ahead of us.
